title: Europe1k evaluation output data
author: Jannis Hoch
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the evaluation output from the PCR-GLOWB model runs over Europe at 1 km, 10 km, and 50 km. The data is hence not the original output data which is too large in its entirety. The here available data is the result of the model output evaluation and contains metrics per water province.
steps_raw: This repository contains the evaluation output from the PCR-GLOWB model runs over Europe at 1 km, 10 km, and 50 km. The data is hence not the original output data which is too large in its entirety. The here available data is the result of the model output evaluation and contains metrics per water province.
